ksa_text: Skill in producing data quality reporting for business and governance audiences, translating technical quality metrics into business risk and operational impact language.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to evaluate/ensure the trustworthiness of the supplier and/or product.

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations for providers of general-purpose AI models

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ability to evaluate/ensure the trustworthiness of the supplier and/or product.
Obligations for providers of general-purpose AI models

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Quality falls outside the primary competency scope of the Data and AI Transformation Lead. This skill KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Data Quality truly out-of-scope for the Data and AI Transformation Lead? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Data Quality as a core or recommended competency for the Data and AI Transformation Lead. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Data Quality falls outside the established competency profile for the Data and AI Transformation Lead. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Data Quality is outside the competency scope of the Data and AI Transformation Lead. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
